title: clinopodium domingense
intro: Clinopodium domingense, also known as Cuban oregano, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the mint family and is native to the Caribbean and Central America. It has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, making it effective against a range of health issues. The health benefits of Clinopodium domingense include relief from colds, fever, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and wounds. Clinopodium domingense can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and topical applications, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
